---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work?

## Alternatives Considered
What other solutions or features have you considered?

## Use Case
Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Example Usage
If applicable, show how this feature would be used:

```typescript
// Example code showing the proposed API or usage
```

## Implementation Ideas
Any thoughts on how this could be implemented? (optional)

## Benefits
- Who would benefit from this feature?
- How would it improve Gravity Claw?

## Potential Drawbacks
Are there any potential downsides or concerns?

## Related Features
Are there any existing features or issues related to this request?

## Additional Context
Any other information, screenshots, or mockups.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] This feature aligns with Gravity Claw's goals
- [ ] I have described a clear use case
- [ ] I would be willing to contribute to implementing this feature
